message:
perf(search): Implement quickselect for top-k selection (Opt 2.5)

Add O(N + k log k) top-k selection using select_nth_unstable_by instead
of O(N log N) full sort. For typical k=25, N=10000, this is ~3x faster.

- Extract cmp_fused_hit_desc comparator from inline closure
- Implement top_k_fused with threshold-based path selection
- Add 11 comprehensive unit tests including equivalence verification
- Update rrf_fuse_hits to use new quickselect-based selection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
